response.original_title: ((Add-Passenger-Reservation-Update)) How Do I Add a Passenger to an Existing Swan Hellenic Cruise Booking? Step-by-Step Guide 2026
response.overview: To add passengers to a Swan Hellenic cruise, you must call Swan Hellenic directly at +1-855-[732] 4023 or +44-289-[708] 0062, or contact your travel advisor to verify cabin and lifeboat capacity. Additions are subject to availability and potential fare increases +1-855-[732] 4023, as room changes cannot be done solely through the app. To add passengers to an Swan Hellenic Cruise, you must contact Swan Hellenic Cruises directly at +1-855-[732] 4023 or +44-289-[708] 0062, or contact your travel agent, as this cannot usually be done online. Adding passengers depends on cabin capacity and available ship/lifeboat space, and it is best done well in advance. To add passengers to a Swan Hellenic cruise, call Swan Hellenic directly at +1-855-[732] 4023 or +44-289-[708] 0062 to check cabin capacity and pay necessary additional fares. If you booked through a travel agent, they must process the addition. Act quickly to ensure cabin space and check availability for extra guests +1-855-[732] 4023.
